Event: Spring Festival 2025
Event Date: 01/03/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: A202
Patron of the Order artifact

Triggers: Once in a while

Crashing Thunder
Starts a storm that lasts for 6 sec. During this time, a lightning bolt strikes 1-4 random enemies every 2 sec. On hit, the lightning bold deals 150000 magic damage and applies an electric pulse. If a lightning bolt strikes an enemy with electric pulse, it ignores shields and damage-reducing effects. The electric pulse lasts for 6 sec. Whenever a unit affected by the electrical pulse uses an ability, they are struck by a lightning discharge that deals 175000 magic damage to that unit and all enemies in a small radius around them. Also, all affected units are stunned for 1 sec.
Additionally, the primary target of the ability has their physical and magic armor reduced by 25% for 4 sec and takes 225000 magic damage for 4 sec.

Requirements: 90-100

User rating: item not rated yet
